raw_input:
[4.0/5] Grainy but perfectly fine to use This shea butter is a good quality shea butter. It is ivory and reasonably priced. As a person whose been using shea butter for well over 10 years for ecezma treatment I can say that this shea butter is a quality product. Although it is a quality shea butter, the way it has been processed left the butter very grainy and not as creamy as I was expecting. It is a thick, heavy butter that is solid at room temperature and has a lot of use for hair and body purposes. It is sourced from an area in Africa that doesn't produce a real rancid smelling butter. It smells distinctly like shea but not like the shea sourced from more eastern countries. The butter when applied to the skin feels thick and heavey but that isn't a problem for me. I would need to indirectly melt and re-solidify this butter in order to smooth it out and kill the grainy texture it comes with. I'd also whip this butter to make it creamy.

Price: Reasonable
Texture: Grainy but not too smooth, sort of like peanut butter but thicker
Color: Ivory, more of an off white, cream like tone
Scent: Hard to describe but it's distinctly Shea which never smells pleasing

Overall, this company's shea butter is a good quality butter, high quality for some but for me good/decent due to the fact it's grainy and doesn't have the smooth texture I'm used too. The color is normal and the butter feels thick, heavy and heavenly on thick dry skin like eczema. I'd recommend this company's shea butter and possibly repurchase in the future.

•This quality shea butter was purchased for a promotional price in exchange for my unbiased and honest review. [5.0/5] A DIYer dream butter. Body Wonders Shea Butter arrived in a 16 oz plastic jar, with no sealed liner inside the cap. It has a creamy yellowish beige kinda of color and it smells like the very distinct smell of Shea butter. It's a very heavy butter, so a little can go such a long way. In winter month the butter is amazing, its thick enough to not disappear in the harsh winds and moisturising enough to keep your skin hydrated and soft. I use it has my night time face cream, it has helped with my dark spots.
There are so many benefits to adding Shea butter to your daily routine:
Shea butter aids in the skin’s natural collagen production and contains oleic, stearic, palmitic and linolenic acids that protect and nourish the skin to prevent drying. With longterm use, many people report skin softening and strengthening as well as wrinkle reduction.
A 2010 study found that due to its cinnamic acid and other natural properties, shea butter was anti-inflammatory.One compound in particular, lupeol cinnamate, was found to reduce skin inflammation and even potentially help avoid skin mutations. This also makes it beneficial for some people with acne.
I received this product at a discount
Please click YES if my review has been helpful to you, it will encourage me to continue writing and updating my reviews, and leave a comment if you have any questions, I will be more than happy to answer if I can be of help

[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]]
[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]]
[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]]
[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]]

[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]]
[[ASIN:B01258J0I2 Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz]] [4.0/5] Ivory colored shea butter with a smoky scent Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz sates it’s 100% pure and virgin. The main name on the label is Organic Shea Butter. The color is a light ovoty and the scent is typical of shea butter. What the bottle doesn’t have and I would have preferred to see is a logo denoting the ‘organic’ certifaction. The back of the label states it’s from Ghana and has not been tested on animals. I think for the price it’s not a bad deal and I like that it comes in a tub. I would have prefeered it to be safety sealed especially since it came with a broken lid. The product appeared to be fine inside. On top of the jat there is also and expiration date of 12/22/18 for Lot 1222BW-sb.

I am a big fan of shea butter and use it daily after my shower. It helps to keep my skin moisturized and and I love the smoky and nutty scent. If you are looking for authentic shes butter this is it…if you are looking for a lotion with shea butter that doesn’t have a strong scent you may not like this. The jar weighs in at 1 pound and 7/8 with the lid off so you are getting a pound of goodness. I have purchasedother products that have been short so I started weighing my products.

I purchased this product at a discounted price in exchange for an honest and unbiased review. I do not guarantee 5 star reviews unless the product is one I would buy again and/or recommend to friends. I like to test out products that I typically would purchase at full price so I can provide a review based on a real trial. My comments and opinions are based on my experience with the product. I hope sharing my experience and writing this review helps you with your purchase decision. [4.0/5] I like this shea I like this shea .I haven't found a Shea I really like. I buy different brands to use In my Cold Process soap. This did work well. No over powering smell. Nice brand [5.0/5] good price, swift delivery What I wanted, good price, swift delivery. Used to keep soles of feet moisturized as have type 2 diatetes. [5.0/5] Five Stars Great moisturizer [3.0/5] Smells weird but feels good It smells weird. I didn't buy it for the smell but just warning you it does have a weird smell. I'm currently using it for stretch marks and scars. I've only been using it for a few weeks and haven't noticed a difference yet but it does feel good on my skin! [5.0/5] Will order again. Just what I wanted. Will order again. [5.0/5] Five Stars Great texture. [5.0/5] Perfect for DIY lotion, and sensitive skin This Shea butter is great. It has a bit of an earthy smell to it, but being that it's completely natural and organic, that doesn't bother me. I personally use it to mix into lotion with coconut oil, rose hip oil, and other essential oils it works great for me. I've also heard you can use it in do-it-yourself deodorant, and lip balm recipes. I've also used it as massage oil as it provides enough lubrication, but doesn't have so much that it's difficult to apply firm pressure. If you use it on your heels and put socks on before you go to bed, it makes them super soft in the morning. If you can get past the mild earthy smell, you're going to love this product! I would buy this a million times over. [5.0/5] All day moisture butter Great Shea butter. Thick & creamy and not grainy which irks me. I use it instead of lotion for whole body moisturizing and also as a hair butter after shampooing. I also love the sturdy jar it comes in. [5.0/5] Happy with the product Happy with the product. The smell is not too strong like some other cheaper product. Applying to my baby's skin every day. She has eczema and this never burns her skin (like some creams and lotions do). [5.0/5] I greatly recommend to buy it I am impressed what it did to my skin! I have never seen my skin so healthy. I greatly recommend to buy it. I melted the butter, added 50 drops of organic lavender essecial oil and am applying it to my skin twice a week after scrub. The pigmentation faded away very fast. Skin became even and silky. Very soft to touch. My body looks younger! I am very impressed. There is a buttery smell but it's totally worth it. Love it!!! [5.0/5] Five Stars I was very satisfied with my purchase [4.0/5] loved the product just that the packaging could be better loved the product just that the packaging could be better. It arrived completely melted and hot. I just put it in the fridge for a bit and it solidified. [5.0/5] LOVE IT!! I have only been using this product for about two weeks and I absolutely LOVE IT!!!!! I have been able to use it as a conditioner for my hair and find that it has made it softer and healthier looking. I have a few stress spots in my hair and have to be extremely careful about the products that I use. This has been a great addition to my regular conditioner. Also, I have used this as a overall body moisturizer and I can't rave about this product enough!! I have had 3 kids and already see the marks fading and my skin just looks more supple and better overall. I only have to use a small amount also for coverage. I will definitely be adding this product to my daily regimen from now on! Great job Body Wonders!!

response:
Good shea butter. Most buyers happy. Here summary:

SMELL: Distinct shea smell. Some say smoky, nutty, earthy. Few find weird. Not overpowering like cheap brands.

TEXTURE: Most find thick, creamy, heavy. One buyer find grainy, say need melt and re-whip fix problem. Another say NOT grainy, very happy. Solid at room temperature.

COLOR: Ivory, off-white, creamy yellowish beige.

USES: Body moisturizer, hair butter, face cream, stretch marks, scars, eczema skin, baby skin, DIY lotion, soap making, massage oil, lip balm, deodorant, heel treatment.

RESULTS: Buyers report soft skin, fading dark spots, fading stretch marks, healthier hair, good eczema relief including baby eczema. One buyer melt butter, add lavender oil, say pigmentation fade fast, skin look younger.

PACKAGING: Come in 16oz tub. One buyer get broken lid. One buyer get product melted from heat during shipping, fix by putting in fridge.

PRICE: Reasonable, good value.

OVERALL: Most give 4-5 stars. Good quality natural shea butter. DIY users especially love. Recommend for dry skin, eczema, hair care.
